title: Add payment processing with Stripe
original_text: Integrated Stripe for payment processing. Added subscription management with recurring billing. Implemented one-time payment flow. Added payment method management (cards, bank accounts). Implemented webhook handling for payment events. Added refund processing. Implemented payment analytics and reporting. Added test mode for development. Added comprehensive tests for payment flows. Result: 48 tests pass.
expected_subject: feat(payments): integrate Stripe for payment processing
expected_body_lines: - Add subscription management with recurring billing
- Implement webhook handling for payment events
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(payments): integrate Stripe for payment processing"
